description: Visa Tracking System and Exchange Programs modules - visa status display with progress bars, document management, predictive expiry reminders, exchange program browsing/filtering, and staff CRUD for programs.
steps: Create src/server/trpc/routers/visa.ts - visa router: getMyVisa query (student's visa record with documents), getAll query (staff - all student visa records with filters), updateStatus mutation (staff - update visa status/expiry/notes), addDocument mutation (create visa document record with file info), updateDocumentStatus mutation (staff - approve/reject documents), getExpiringVisas query (staff - visas expiring within N days), getDocumentChecklist query (returns required documents based on visa type)

Create src/app/(dashboard)/visa/page.tsx - Student visa tracking dashboard: Current visa status card with large progress bar visualization (Valid -> Expiring Soon -> Expired states with color transitions green/yellow/red), visa type and expiry date prominently displayed, countdown to expiry, Required Documents Checklist (checkboxes showing submitted/pending/approved/rejected with icons), Upload Document section with drag-drop zone placeholder, Reminders section showing upcoming deadlines (60/30/14/7 day alerts styled as warning/danger cards), History timeline of visa status changes

Create src/app/(dashboard)/staff/visa/page.tsx - Staff visa management: searchable table of all student visa records, status filter chips, click to view/edit student's visa details, bulk reminder sending capability, expiring soon alert counter at top with colored badges

Create src/app/(dashboard)/staff/visa/[id]/page.tsx - Staff visa detail for a student: edit visa record (type, status, expiry date, notes), review uploaded documents (approve/reject with comments), document checklist management, add manual status notes

Create src/lib/visa-utils.ts - utility functions: calculateDaysUntilExpiry, getVisaStatusFromExpiry (auto-calculate VALID/EXPIRING_SOON/EXPIRED based on days), getRequiredDocuments (returns checklist by visa type), formatVisaProgress (percentage for progress bar)

Create src/server/trpc/routers/exchange.ts - exchange router: getAll query (public - with filters for type/deadline/search, pagination, sort by deadline), getById query, create mutation (staff only - all program fields with Zod validation), update mutation (staff only), archive mutation (staff only - soft archive), getApplications query (staff - see who applied), apply mutation (student applies to program)

Create src/app/(dashboard)/exchange/page.tsx - Exchange programs browse page: Hero section with 'Explore Global Opportunities' heading, filter bar (type: Academic/Cultural/Mobility, deadline status: active/past, search input), program cards grid (3 columns on desktop) showing title, type badge, brief description, deadline with countdown, eligibility preview, 'Learn More' button with hover scale animation

Create src/app/(dashboard)/exchange/[id]/page.tsx - Program detail page: full-width hero with program title and type, two-column layout (main content: description, eligibility requirements list, key dates/deadlines, application URL button | sidebar: quick facts card with type/deadline/status, Apply Now CTA, related programs list), back to browse button

Create src/app/(dashboard)/staff/exchange/page.tsx - Staff exchange management: table view of all programs with status (active/archived), create new program button, inline edit/archive actions, application count per program

Create src/app/(dashboard)/staff/exchange/new/page.tsx - Create/Edit exchange program form: title, type dropdown, description (rich textarea), eligibility (textarea), deadline (date picker), application URL, save with validation and toast feedback
Wire up visa and exchange routers in main appRouter
acceptance_criteria: Student visa page shows progress bar with color-coded status (green/yellow/red)
Document checklist shows required documents with status indicators
Predictive reminders display at 60/30/14/7 days before visa expiry
Staff can update visa status and approve/reject documents
Exchange programs page has filterable grid of program cards
Program detail page shows full info with eligibility and deadlines
Staff can create, edit, and archive exchange programs
All tRPC routers have proper Zod validation
findings: Build and lint pass cleanly. Used Suspense boundary for useSearchParams in staff/exchange/new page (Next.js 14 requirement for static generation). Exchange router uses z.literal('') as alternate for optional URL validation. Visa progress bar uses percentage mapped from days (0-365 days -> 0-100%). Color thresholds: green for 60+ days, yellow for 14-60 days, red for <14 days.
